request: Test Researcher external CLI invocation with web search and image generation; produce a LandingHub ad poster.
request_original: 리서쳐 외부 cli 별도로 호출해서 웹검색 시켜봐 ... 실제 웹사이트를 확인하고 그 웹서비스에 맞는 광고 포스터를 만드는거야 ... download 폴더 생성 후 작업 내용에 맞는 폴더를 또 생성 후 거기다가 이미지를 넣어놨으면 좋겠어
tier_rationale: Real external Codex CLI Researcher invocation with web search + image generation attempt + filesystem deliverable. Exercises the external_cli_fallback Researcher pathway end-to-end. No product runtime impact.

include: download/TASK-20260429-020-landinghub-poster/ (created folder + research summary + ad poster prompt + image if generation capability exists)
exclude: Authority document changes (this is a procedural test, not a policy change)
Secrets, credentials, or environment variable values

success_criteria: Step 1: Probe whether Codex CLI exposes an image_generation tool by invoking it with a test image-gen request; record tool availability outcome.

Step 2: Run real Researcher external CLI (Codex) for web search on (a) latest ChatGPT Image enhancement news and (b) the LandingHub deployed website https://landinghub-api.lanfinghub-kr.workers.dev so the ad poster can match the actual service.
Step 3: Synthesize Research Summary per docs/guides/researcher-procedure-ko.md (research_question, scope, sources with snippets, confidence, log).
Step 4: Craft a complete ad-poster prompt based on real research findings (visual concept, copy, style, dimensions, target audience).

Step 5: If Codex image gen is available, generate the poster image and save to download/TASK-20260429-020-landinghub-poster/poster.png. If not, save the prompt as a text file with ChatGPT-Image-ready instructions and document the limitation honestly.
Step 6: Write Tier 2 report in the new agent-by-agent activity format (output-formats v1.19), with Researcher section as the central narrative.
Step 7: All Researcher outputs (events, last_message, run metadata) preserved as audit artifacts.
Step 8: Insight capture: at least one observation about external Codex Researcher pathway behavior.

positive: Use real external Codex CLI invocation (not in-session WebSearch/WebFetch) per user explicit request for external cli fallback.
Honor secret-preflight guard; researcher input must not contain secret values.
Use append-only ledger with full event chain.
If image generation fails, document the failure mode (which tool was/wasn't available) as an insight.
negative: Do not include OAuth token or any secret values in researcher handoff or any committed file.
Do not modify product runtime code or authority documents.
Do not commit the generated image if it would exceed reasonable repo size; downloads/ folder is acceptable but if image is large, document and exclude.
Do not silently fail on image generation; explicit honesty about whether it worked is a success criterion.
